creator: jwb@freebsd.org
text:
OK by me...

Regards,

     JB

On 01/13/14 03:48, Kubilay Kocak wrote:
> Jason,
>
> I'd like to make 2 additional changes before I commit this:
>
> - Add a regression-test target so users/developers may run the test suite:
>
> regression-test: build
> 	cd ${WRKSRC} && ${MAKE} check
>
> Add USES=gmake as per:
>
> http://www.swig.org/Doc2.0/Preface.html:
>
> "You must use GNU make to build and install SWIG."
>
> This note was removed from the README into the HTML documentation in:
>
> https://github.com/swig/swig/commit/4bf045ce2c72f3cf3a20caa9dc42b26c9e6b6458#diff-c47c7c7383225ab55ff591cb59c41e6b
>
> The test suite fails part way when invoked with our make:
>
> make: don't know how to make check-tcl-version. Stop
